title: IntegrationDefinition
description: One external integration (MCP server or HTTP-endpoint set). An integration declares no capability envelope: the realised tools reported by the provider are the only capability source.

id.description: Stable integration id. Optional in-file: falls back to the filename stem when omitted.

type.description: Integration kind: an MCP server (stdio or streamable HTTP), or a code-defined HTTP tool set.

active.description: Whether this integration feeds capability resolution. Defaults to true when omitted.

config.description: Type-specific payload. MCP_STDIO: an object with required 'command' (executable only, no shell parsing) plus optional 'args' (array of strings), 'env' (object of literal string values), and 'requestTimeout' (ISO-8601 duration, default PT30S). MCP_STREAMABLE_HTTP: an object with required 'url' plus optional 'requestTimeout', 'staticHeaders' (object of literal header name to value, sent on every request) and 'secretHeaders' (object of header name to secret-reference key, resolved via SecretResolver at connect time). HTTP_TOOL: an array of HttpEndpointDefinition objects, validated against #/$defs/httpEndpoint by the conditional below.

httpEndpoint.description: One HTTP_TOOL endpoint = one capability (OSS HttpEndpointDefinition).

mutating.description: Whether invoking this endpoint may mutate remote state; the realised tool risk signal (recommend gating a mutating endpoint with REQUIRE_APPROVAL).

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the tool arguments; non-null.

secretHeaders.description: Header name to secret-reference key, resolved at invoke.

timeout.description: ISO-8601 duration (e.g. PT30S), or null for the provider default.

maxRetries.description: Retry budget, or null for unset.
